name: Challenging Dogfights
short_description: Take control of the US aircrafts at the World War II, fight against deadly enemies! Play through several challenging missions and free-play mode with the desired map, aircraft and difficulty.
detailed_description:
Take control of the US planes at the World War II, fight against deadly enemies! Control various American aircrafts at various maps from cities to oceans. Play through several challenging missions with unique objectives, alongside a free-play mode with the desired map, aircraft and difficulty. Compete against other players on the Steam leaderboards.

Features:
  • Various missions with objectives to play through.
  • Free-play mode with 2 difficulty options.
  • 7 different real World War II aircrafts.
  • 4 different maps.
  • Decent musics and effects.
